lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਨੁ ਤੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਜੈ ਧਨ ਭਾਗ ਮਥਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: laalan tai paaeaa aap gavaaeaa jai dhan bhaag mathaane |
lines.english: They alone find their Beloved, who eradicate self-conceit; such is the good destiny written on their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਾਰ ਵੇ ਤੈ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਲਾਲਨੁ ਮੂ ਦਸਿ ਦਸੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: yaar ve tai raaviaa laalan moo das dasandaa |
lines.english: O intimate friend, you have enjoyed your Beloved; please, tell me about Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਂਹ ਪਕੜਿ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਹਉ ਘਿਧੀ ਗੁਣ ਅਵਗਣ ਨ ਪਛਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: baanh pakarr tthaakur hau ghidhee gun avagan na pachhaane |
lines.english: Taking me by the arm, the Lord and Master has made me His own; He has not considered my merits or demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਹਾਰੁ ਤੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਹਭੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੁਹੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: gun haar tai paaeaa rang laal banaaeaa tis habho kichh suhandaa |
lines.english: She, whom You have adorned with the necklace of virtue, and dyed in the deep crimson color of His Love - everything looks beautiful on her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਧੰਨਿ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਸਾਈ ਜਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਭਤਾਰੁ ਵਸੰਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak dhan suhaagan saaee jis sang bhataar vasandaa |3|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, blessed is that happy soul-bride, who dwells with her Husband Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰੁ ਲੋੜੀਦਾ ਆਇਆ ਵਜੀ ਵਾਧਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: var lorreedaa aaeaa vajee vaadhaaee |
lines.english: My sought-after Husband Lord has come home, and now, congratulations are pouring in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਾਰ ਵੇ ਨਿਤ ਸੁਖ ਸੁਖੇਦੀ ਸਾ ਮੈ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: yaar ve nit sukh sukhedee saa mai paaee |
lines.english: O intimate friend, I have found that peace which I sought.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਰਹਸੁ ਥੀਆ ਪਿਰੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਸਦ ਨਵ ਰੰਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa mangal rehas theea pir deaal sad nav rangeea |
lines.english: Great joy and happiness welled up, when my Husband Lord, of ever-fresh beauty, showed mercy to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡ ਭਾਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸਤਸੰਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: vadd bhaag paaeaa gur milaaeaa saadh kai satasangeea |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I have found Him; the Guru has united me with Him, through the Saadh Sangat, the True Congregation of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਸਗਲ ਪੂਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਅੰਕਿ ਅੰਕੁ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa sagal pooree pria ank ank milaaee |
lines.english: My hopes and desires have all been fulfilled; my Beloved Husband Lord has hugged me close in His embrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸੁਖ ਸੁਖੇਦੀ ਸਾ ਮੈ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak sukh sukhedee saa mai gur mil paaee |4|1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I have found that peace which I sought, meeting with the Guru. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਛੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 ghar 2 chhant |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਰਾਖਨ ਕਉ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee raakhan kau samarath |1|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of God, who is all-powerful to save us. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਅਕਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: aoochaa agam apaar prabh kathan na jaae akath |
lines.english: God is lofty, unapproachable and infinite. He is indescribable - He cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਗਨਉ ਅਸੰਖ ਅਵਗਣ ਮੇਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kete gnau asankh avagan meriaa |
lines.english: My demerits are uncountable; how many of them should I count?

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jaanahu tiau raakh har prabh teriaa |
lines.english: Save me, any way You can; O Lord God, I am Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ਮਾਇਆ ਤਉ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਘੂਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: moh magan bikaraal maaeaa tau prasaadee ghooleeai |
lines.english: I am intoxicated by emotional attachment to Maya, the treacherous one; by Your Grace alone can I be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੰਖ ਅਵਗਣ ਖਤੇ ਫੇਰੇ ਨਿਤਪ੍ਰਤਿ ਸਦ ਭੂਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: asankh avagan khate fere nitaprat sad bhooleeai |
lines.english: The sins and crimes I committed are countless; day by day, I continually make mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੂਕ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਬਿਖੜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨੇਰ ਹੂ ਤੇ ਨੇਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: look karat bikaar bikharre prabh ner hoo te neriaa |
lines.english: Secretly, I commit hideous sins of corruption, even though God is the nearest of the near.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਕਾਢਿ ਭਵਜਲ ਫੇਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak deaa dhaarahu kaadt bhavajal feriaa |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, shower me with Your Mercy, Lord, and lift me up, out of the whirlpool of the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀਆ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਥਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kee benanteea milai nithaave thaau |2|
lines.english: This is Nanak's humble prayer, to bless the homeless with a home. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਤਿ ਨ ਪਵੈ ਅਸੰਖ ਗੁਣ ਊਚਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nirat na pavai asankh gun aoochaa prabh kaa naau |
lines.english: Countless are His virtues; they cannot be enumerated. God's Name is lofty and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਸਰ ਨਾਹੀ ਠਾਉ ਕਾ ਪਹਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: doosar naahee tthaau kaa peh jaaeeai |
lines.english: There is no other place at all - where else should I go?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar kar jorr so prabh dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, with my palms pressed together, I meditate on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਇ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਦਾ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: dhiaae so prabh sadaa apunaa maneh chindiaa paaeeai |
lines.english: Meditating forever on my God, I receive the fruits of my mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਏਕ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan mohu vikaar doojaa ek siau liv laaeeai |
lines.english: Renouncing pride, attachment, corruption and duality, I lovingly center my attention on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਧਾਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਾਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak dhaar kirapaa saach naam samaaeeai |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, shower me with Your mercy, Lord, that I may be absorbed in Your True Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਪਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਆਗੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਗਲ ਮਿਟਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: arap man tan prabhoo aagai aap sagal mittaaeeai |
lines.english: Dedicate your mind and body to God; eradicate all your self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan sancheeai naanak nibahai saath |3|
lines.english: Gather the wealth of the Lord's Name; O Nanak, it shall always be with You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man taa kau dhiaaeeai sabh bidh jaa kai haath |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on the One, who holds everything in His hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਪੂਰ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar aap jal thal poor soe |
lines.english: In the places and interspaces, in the water and on the land, He Himself is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਥੀਅੜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਦੂਸਰ ਨਾਹਿ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: saatheearraa prabh ek doosar naeh koe |
lines.english: God is our only True Friend; there is not any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਦਾਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal poor rahiaa sarab daataa prabh dhanee |
lines.english: He is totally permeating the water, the land and the sky; God is the Great Giver, the Lord and Master of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਅੰਤੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਗੁਣ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਕਿਆ ਗਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: gopaal gobind ant naahee beant gun taa ke kiaa ganee |
lines.english: The Lord of the world, the Lord of the universe has no limit; His Glorious Virtues are unlimited - how can I count them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak deaa dhaarahu tis paraapat naam hoe |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, that being, unto whom the Lord shows mercy - he alone obtains the Naam. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੁਖਹ ਗਾਮੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨਾ ਅਨ ਨਾਹਿ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaj saran suaamee sukhah gaamee tis binaa an naeh koe |
lines.english: I have hurried to the Sanctuary of the Lord Master, the Bringer of peace; without Him, there is no other at all.
